title: Control weeds
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Control weeds demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess weed infestation

pcs.text: Identify and record weeds and potential weeds for target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record weeds and potential weeds for target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record weeds and potential weeds for target area.

pcs.text: Identify the scope, stage and size of the weed infestation impacting on target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the scope, stage and size of the weed infestation impacting on target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the scope, stage and size of the weed infestation impacting on target area.

pcs.text: Assess effect of weed infestation on target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess effect of weed infestation on target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess effect of weed infestation on target area.

pcs.text: Identify tolerable levels of infestation according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tolerable levels of infestation according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tolerable levels of infestation according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Investigate approaches to control weed infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate approaches to control weed infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate approaches to control weed infestation.

pcs.text: Identify non-target plant and animal species present in the area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-target plant and animal species present in the area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-target plant and animal species present in the area.

pcs.text: Assess the site for suitability of control measures according to health and safety in the workplace and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the site for suitability of control measures according to health and safety in the workplace and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the site for suitability of control measures according to health and safety in the workplace and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess weed infestation

elements.title: Plan weed control measures

pcs.text: Determine suitable control options according to workplace requirements and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine suitable control options according to workplace requirements and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine suitable control options according to workplace requirements and legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and assess hazards, risks and controls according to workplace procedures and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess hazards, risks and controls according to workplace procedures and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess hazards, risks and controls according to workplace procedures and regulations.

pcs.text: Identify appropriate resources for control options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate resources for control options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate resources for control options.

pcs.text: Identify, fit and use personal protective equipment in accordance with health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, fit and use personal protective equipment in accordance with health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, fit and use personal protective equipment in accordance with health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select and prepare a plan for control measures according to workplace strategy and environmental legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare a plan for control measures according to workplace strategy and environmental legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare a plan for control measures according to workplace strategy and environmental legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Document control measures according to workplace and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document control measures according to workplace and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document control measures according to workplace and legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan weed control measures

elements.title: Implement weed control

pcs.text: Assess conditions for implementation of control plan and adjust plan according to conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess conditions for implementation of control plan and adjust plan according to conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess conditions for implementation of control plan and adjust plan according to conditions.

pcs.text: Implement control measures in accordance with workplace pest management plan and industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement control measures in accordance with workplace pest management plan and industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement control measures in accordance with workplace pest management plan and industry best practice.

pcs.text: Ensure that control measures minimise effect on non-target species and environmental damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that control measures minimise effect on non-target species and environmental damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that control measures minimise effect on non-target species and environmental damage.

pcs.text: Maintain records of the control measure according workplace procedures and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of the control measure according workplace procedures and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of the control measure according workplace procedures and regulatory requirements.

elements.title: Monitor weed control measures

pcs.text: Monitor weed control measures and identify adverse impact on non-target entities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weed control measures and identify adverse impact on non-target entities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess effectiveness of weed control measures in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report results of assessment according to client or workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report results of assessment according to client or workplace procedures.
